goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should 'arrive by 11:15'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'scott polar museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'attraction type', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should arrive by 11:15
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called scott polar museum
Make sure you get entrance fee, attraction type, and phone number
